hero.title: Your office.
hero.subtitle: Officia is a modern SaaS platform for accountants and office workers — invoices, documents, HR, AI assistant, and a business dashboard in one professional workspace.

benefits.b1: AI generates invoices and office documents
benefits.b2: Reads PDF/DOCX and extracts key data
benefits.b3: Answers questions based on company docs
benefits.b4: Tracks deadlines, payments, and admin tasks

dashboardPreview.label: Officia dashboard
dashboardPreview.title: June overview
dashboardPreview.aiQuote: "I prepared the invoice, found a missing IBAN in the contract, and highlighted 3 tasks due this week."

modules.label: Modules v1.0
modules.title: All your office. One place.
modules.subtitle: The first version focuses on real daily work: documents, invoices, employees, tasks, and an AI assistant.
modules.m1Desc: Invoices, expenses, VAT, payments, and monthly reports in one clean workspace.
modules.m2Desc: Employees, contracts, leaves, files, and deadline reminders.
modules.m3Desc: Archive, AI reading, data extraction, and quick search for important files.
modules.m4Desc: Claude-powered assistant for questions, documents, invoices, and office workflows.
modules.m5Desc: Business overview for revenue, expenses, tasks, documents, and operational risks.
modules.m6Desc: Role-based access, audit trail, and enterprise-ready foundation for teams.

stack.label: 2026 SaaS stack
stack.title: Modern, scalable, AI-first.
stack.subtitle: Officia starts with a production-ready architecture: Next.js 15, Supabase, Drizzle, Claude, shadcn/ui, Stripe, Resend, Clerk, and Vercel.

waitlistSection.title: Join the Officia waitlist
waitlistSection.subtitle: Sign up for early access. The form already saves requests in a Supabase waitlist table.

footer.tagline: European AI SaaS for accountants and office teams.
